upstream.name: openclaw/openclaw
upstream.fork_base_commit: refactor: trim gateway server type exports

local_changes.summary: Declares /home/node/.openclaw as a Docker volume while preserving digest-pinned Node base images.
Adds native OpenClaw Zeke tools backed by the ZekeFlow authority API, with profile-specific catalog tests and backend-only create_signal enforcement.
Adds Sprout, Rambo internal, and external-client profile templates that preserve native Zeke tool visibility boundaries.
Adds user-facing ZekeBot platform docs for profiles, native tools, channels, memory/session boundaries, troubleshooting, and changelog.
